title: orthochilus hians
intro: Orthochilus hians, also known as the Hian's orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orthochilus hians include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tea or infusion, with the leaves and flowers being dried and steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
